description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has long sleeves with flat knit cuffs and hem, hood with drawstring, two insert pockets on the sides with assymetric openings, and padded brand name appliqued on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations A sportswear classic, this sweatshirt from fila is the backbone of your casual wardrobe and a refreshing addition to your winter collection. The thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, while the stylish branding oozes strong sporty attitude. Layer it over t-shirts, jeans or tracks and sneakers. Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
